title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates frontier models with access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. The platform orchestrates multi-step research workflows, enabling researchers to move from hypothesis to experimental design in accelerated timeframes, as demonstrated with genetic variant investigation.
